url: Frequently faced pronunciation problems in Konkani (Devanagari)

rows: Say ka and kha clearly: ka.
Say ka and kha clearly: kha.
Do not mix ta and tha.
Do not mix da and dha.
Retroflex ta is not dental ta.

title: Combining consonants with र (r) – Konkani जोडाक्षरे Part 2

title: Combining consonants with ह (h) – Konkani जोडाक्षरे Part 3

url: Special or separate symbols for combined consonants in Konkani

rows: Practice the vowel अ — it sounds like 'a' in 'about'.
The consonant क is a guttural 'ka'.
Write ख and say it clearly: 'kha'.
Nasal अं needs a soft nose sound.
Combine क + अ to read क.
Read slowly: क ख ग घ.
हळू वाच: क ख ग घ
Halu vaach: k kha ga gha
Retroflex ट is made with the tongue curled back.
Do not mix ट and त — listen carefully.
The letter र changes shape in clusters.
ह at the end of a cluster is soft.
Stress usually falls on the last syllable.

title: Special or separate symbols for combined consonants in Konkani

url: Sentence using "If-Then" in Konkani

rows: If it rains, I stay home.
जर पावस पडटा तर हांव घरा रावतां
Jar paavas paddtaa tar haanv ghara raavtaan
जर तूं येता तर आमी जेवतात
Jar tum yetaa tar aami jevtaat
जर तो फोन करता तर उत्तर दी
Jar to phone kartaa tar uttar di
If she is ready, we go.
जर ती तयार आसा तर आमी वचतात
Jar ti tayaar aasaa tar aami vachataat
जर ते मानतात तर आमी सुरू करतात
Jar te maantaat tar aami suru kartaat
If I am free, I come.
जर हांव मोकळो आसां तर हांव येतां
Jar haanv mokallo aasaan tar haanv yetaan
If food is ready, call me.
जर जेवण तयार आसा तर म्हाका आपय
Jar jevan tayaar aasaa tar mhaakaa aapay
जर तुका समजता तर हो म्हण
Jar tuka samjataa tar ho mhon
If it is hot, drink water.
जर उष्ण आसा तर उदक पी
Jar ushna aasaa tar udak pi
जर आमी मेळतात तर आमी उलयतात
Jar aami meltaat tar aami ulaytaat
If the shop is open, buy.
जर दुकान उगडें आसा तर घे
Jar dukaan ugadem aasaa tar ghe
जर तूं थकलो आसा तर विश्रांत घे
Jar tum thaklo aasaa tar vishraant ghe

title: Sentence using "If-Then" in Konkani

rows: I wanted to go but I stayed.

हांव प्रयत्न केलो पण नापास जालों

Jar tum maantaat tar aami pudem vachataat
थकलो आशिल्लो तरी तानें काम केलें
Thaklo aashillo tari taanem kaam kelem

url: Konkani jokes – Learn Konkani in a fun way

rows: Why did the cat sit? — For a nap.
Two friends and one banana — sharing!
दोन इश्ट आनी एक केळी — वांट!
Don isht aani ek keli — vaant!
He slipped on a peel — ouch!
Why is the sky blue? — Ask science!
Two plus two is four — not five!
दोन आनी दोन चार — पांच ना!
Don aani don chaar — paanch naa!
The phone rang — it was mom.

title: Konkani jokes – Learn Konkani in a fun way

url: Conversation about the eclipse in Konkani

rows: Today there is a solar eclipse.
Do not look at the sun directly.
Do not eat during the eclipse.

title: Conversation about the eclipse in Konkani

url: Simple Konkani conversation – Quarrel at home

rows: Let us not fight at home.
I did not mean to hurt you.
Do not bring up old fights.
